title: AuthmePasswordHider
description:
EN  Client-side privacy mod that hides AuthMe passwords on stream.
TR  Yayında AuthMe şifrelerinin görünmesini engelleyen client-side gizlilik modu.
body:
# EN

## AuthMe Mask

Client-side privacy mod that prevents AuthMe passwords from being exposed on stream.

### Feat
- Masks sensitive commands in chat history:
  - `/login`, `/l`
  - `/register`, `/reg`
  - `/changepassword`, `/cp`
- Visually masks password while typing in chat.
- Toggle from Mod Menu.
- No server/plugin changes needed.

### Note
- Client-side only.
- Real command is still sent to server.
- Compatible with AuthMe flow on servers.

### Req
- Minecraft 1.21+
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu
- Java 21+

# TR

## AuthMe Mask

Yayında AuthMe sifrenin gorunmesini engelleyen client-side gizlilik modu.

### Oz
- Sohbet gecmisinde hassas komutlari maskeler:
  - `/login`, `/l`
  - `/register`, `/reg`
  - `/changepassword`, `/cp`
- Yazarken parola kismini `*` olarak gizler.
- Mod Menu uzerinden ac/kapat.
- Sunucu/plugin degisikligi gerektirmez.

### Not
- Tamamen client-side calisir.
- Sunucuya giden komut degismez.
- AuthMe davranisini bozmaz.

### Gerek
- Minecraft 1.21+
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu
- Java 21+
